---
title: "demote_and_unfold"
generated: true
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

*decorated:* `@partial(jax.jit, static_argnames=('target_address', 'axes'))`

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:demote_and_unfold -->
```python
demote_and_unfold(tensor: Shaped[Array, ...], target_address: int, axes: Union[int, Tuple[int, ...]] | None = None) -> Shaped[Array, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:demote_and_unfold -->
*TODO: write an overview.*
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:demote_and_unfold -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `tensor` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `target_address` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `axes` | `Union[int, Tuple[int, ...]] | None` | — | `None` | — |

**Returns** `Shaped[Array, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
